_legend.rule_format: ANCHOR+days or ANCHOR-days. e.g. C+1 = 1 day after confirmation, P-15 = 15 days before program start

tasks.name: Sign contracts with hotels and DMCs
Followup with client/sales on program confirmation date
Send deposit invoice to university
Create mastersheet
tasks.notes: Use template and fill information on an on-going basis

tasks.name: Set up Monday.com/google sheet for collaboration with all university stakeholders
Share participant data template to collect information (including scanned passport copies)
Prepare for in-person/online program orientation and safety briefing
Send balance invoice to university
Create and share pre-departure guide
tasks.notes: Refer to standard pre dep template

tasks.name: Create checklist for delivery
Plan and prepare first aid kits and other relevant material specific to programs
Print checklists and relevant documents
Send post program invoice to the university
Send thank you notes to partner organizations / companies
tasks.notes: Send thank you notes on the same day of the visit (could vary based on the work load)

tasks.name: Ensure sales hand-off template is filled; clarify doubts, if any before working on the proposal
Use itinerary elements template to detail out the requirements
Get quotes from DMCs/hotels for program dates
Finalize hotel options for the proposal
Complete and review the costing sheet and proposal
Block all proposed hotels and guides
tasks.notes: ensure payments & cancellation are on agreeable terms

tasks.name: Followup with client/sales on the proposal status to release or keep the blocks
Mandatory vendor service specification documentation
Complete program orientation for guides and local partners
Verify pre-program delivery checklist
Block and sign contracts with chosen hotels and procure invoices with payment details
tasks.notes: As per updated numbers received from the university

tasks.name: Release block for other hotels across locations
Send advance to chosen hotels: CCA / bank transfer / outward remittance
Collect rooming list from client and send it to hotels
Confirm preferred flight/train option with client
Collect participant information / passport scans
Book tickets (either with vendor or directly online) and share tickets with university
Confirm preferred train option with client
Collect participant information / passport scans
Book tickets (either with vendor or directly online) and share tickets with university
Share tickets with client
Book dates of preferred guides (Directly or with DMC)
Send draft itinerary to guides/DMC along with the academic objective briefing
Send final itinerary / checklist and PAX info to guides
Send advance for entrance fees etc.
Confirm requirement for each destination / specific visits or requirements (e.g. seatbelts, wheelchair acess etc.) and share with vendors/DMC
Send transport/DMC itinerary to check about routes, timings or any specific requirements/issues
Share arrival and departure schedule to university and share it with vendors/DMC
Send final itinerary and placard
Confirm meal requirements to be included
Research appropriate options in each destination (if not done already)
tasks.notes: sometimes we have specific seating requirement

tasks.name: Contact shortlisted venues to get availability, rates and menu details
Finalilze and block chosen venues
Pay advance, if needed
Send dietary restrictions
Finalize menu with dietary restrictions
Reconfirm seating and menu
Confirm exact requirement from client (preferred venue location, purpose of meeting, group size, AV requirement, F&B etc.)
Identify, block and finalize venue
Pay advance, if needed
Re-confirm exact requirements from university and share it with vendors
Finalilze and block chosen options with any specific instruction (e.g. specific guides, atomic bomb survivor etc.)
Pay advance, if needed
Brief PDs/Content partners regarding program theme and requirements
Collect relevant info to be shared (e.g. bio book) from client
Finalize visits in discussion with the client and PDs
Get logistical contacts from PDs at for each visit
Co-ordinate with organizations about the visit (timings, address, meals, security protocols like passports, roster sheet, license plate)
Plan and procure gifts for organization visits
Immediate debrief with all stakeholders within 48 hours
Service failure compensation processing
Local partner performance evaluation
Process improvement documentation
Client satisfaction follow-up call
